basic_details.job_title: Zakir Husain Delhi College Counsellor Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Zakir Husain Delhi College Counsellor Recruitment 2026: Zakir Husain Delhi College Counsellor Notification 2026 has been released on 25 May 2026 through the official college website. A total of 1 Counsellor vacancy has been announced under the Zakir Husain Delhi College Counsellor Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.A. in Psychology/clinical psychology with minimum one year of experience as a Counsellor
qualification.details: M.A. in Psychology/clinical psychology along with minimum one year of experience as a Counsellor in a reputed institution, preferably within an educational institute.

salary_details.pay_scale: As per University of Delhi/UGC norms
salary_details.details: As per University of Delhi/UGC norms
